message:
🐛 Fix dnd-kit useLayoutEffect error + reduce dashboard padding

- Bundle @dnd-kit with vendor chunk to fix React import issues
  (separating it caused "useLayoutEffect undefined" error)
- Reduce top padding in dashboard from 24px to 12px to maximize space

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
